<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    { name: 'channelId', in: 'path', description: 'ID of the channel', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true },
    { name: 'keyId', in: 'path', description: 'ID of the key', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>
